situation: deepMergeSettings hardcodes vision/counter/detectionParams as nested merge keys. Any future AppSettings field with object type silently gets shallow-merged, dropping defaults.
action: Refactored deepMergeSettings to auto-detect plain-object keys in DEFAULT_SETTINGS and deep-merge them generically. No hardcoded key list; adding a new nested config field requires zero maintenance in storage.ts.
outcome_evidence: Commit b064ced on auto/opt-shared-1783413612 pushed to origin. Function now iterates Object.keys(DEFAULT_SETTINGS), checks typeof===object && !Array.isArray, applies spread merge. Existing behavior preserved for vision/counter/detectionParams; future nested fields auto-covered.
next_suggestion: Continue dispatching remaining 9 pending findings from audit-2026-07-07-047. Next: SZ-SH-L-002 (loadSettings empty object truthiness) or SZ-SH-L-003 (vite.config unused mode param).

audit_findings.finding: deepMergeSettings hardcodes three nested keys — fragile when AppSettings gains new object-typed fields
audit_findings.remediation: Generic iteration over DEFAULT_SETTINGS keys with typeof check
